pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh line 30 - mailbox created with name 'IT Support'
Task description (Email field) and setup_task.sh line 30 - mailbox created with email 'itsupport@acmecorp.com'
Task description signature block: 'Acme Corp IT Support Team'
Task description signature block: 'Portal: https://support.acmecorp.com'. Metadata stores domain without protocol, but full URL with https:// is required in task description.
Task description signature block: 'Hours: Monday - Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST'
Task description signature block: 'Hours: Monday - Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST'. Task requires EST timezone, but metadata omits it.
Task description confidentiality section: 'CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE: This email and any attachments...'
Task description confidentiality section: 'for the exclusive and confidential use of the intended recipient'

privileged_info_summary: The configure_mailbox_signature task requires an agent to set up an email signature for the 'IT Support' mailbox (itsupport@acmecorp.com) in a FreeScout helpdesk environment with specific content including: team name (Acme Corp IT Support Team), phone ((555) 234-5678), email (itsupport@acmecorp.com), support hours (Monday - Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST), portal URL (https://support.acmecorp.com), and a confidentiality notice. All data is synthetic, created within the FreeScout test environment. Two metadata claims have minor discrepancies: the portal URL in task description includes https:// protocol while metadata stores only the domain, and hours_times in metadata omits the EST timezone present in the task description.
